TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Joel_Bolomboy, title = Joel_Bolomboy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joel_Bolomboy} }

S.FORM: Joel Bolomboy hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1994, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 1, Joel Bolomboy, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Joel Bolomboy hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1994, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 1, Joel Bolomboy, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oel βolomβoj ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ / pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oel βolomβoj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
